title: The Brothers Karamazov
text: The mystery of human existence lies not in just staying alive, but in finding something to live for.

title: The Brothers Karamazov
text: The more I love humanity in general, the less I love man in particular.

title: Faust
text: Two souls, alas, dwell in my breast.

title: Faust
text: Gray, dear friend, is all theory, and green the golden tree of life.

title: Epistles of Seneca
text: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.

title: Stalker
text: Let everything that’s been planned come true.

title: Outer Wilds
text: The future is always built on the past, even if we won’t get to see it.
